keyPoints: Staged friction architecture coupled with reflective prompts as the core intervention lever.
Reciprocal grit–growth mindset dynamics as the mechanism linking effort to long-term outcomes.
Rigorous, cluster-randomized longitudinal trial design across multiple sites to establish causal effects.
Primary outcomes centered on grit, discipline/self-regulation, risk tolerance, and domain-relevant project success.
Clear measurement strategy with repeated assessments, validated instruments, and cross-domain validity.
Fidelity, ethics, and equity embedded in trial implementation to ensure safety and generalizability.
Balance insights with caution about current sparse direct evidence in non-educational long-duration projects.
